role_summary: Monitors the health and operational status of the host system and all registered child agents. Provides real-time CPU/RAM metrics and asynchronous connectivity checks to ensure system stability and agent availability.
primary_capabilities: Asynchronously ping active child agents via HTTP
Read agent registry for active agent information
Provide a comprehensive system health status report
Expose a detailed monitoring endpoint for specific agent status requests

api_endpoints.summary: Retrieves current system health including CPU, RAM, and child agent connectivity status.
Requests a detailed status report for specified agents or the entire system with configurable depth.
